latest.title: Why You Need an AI Harness Before You Scale Agents
latest.description: I built a small AI harness over a weekend to solve a real problem: agent workflows were fast, but hard to control. This article shares the AWS blueprint I used to add guardrails, observability, and safe rollout gates before scaling.

latest.title: Implementing Database Guardrails to Prevent Prompt Injection in AI Agents
latest.description: AI agents that access production databases introduce a new class of security risk: prompt injection. Unlike traditional vulnerabilities that require technical expertise to exploit, prompt injection attacks use plain language to manipulate an AI agent into bypassing its instructions and accessing unauthorized data. In this post, you learn how to implement a three-layer defense architecture on AWS that makes unauthorized data access architecturally impossible, regardless of what prompts an attacker sends.

latest.title: Norfolk State University Outreach Experience
latest.description: My journey in outreaching to different professors within the university and connecting with students. I had the opportunity to connect with a lot of individuals on campus that enhanced my knowledge and awareness.

latest.title: AWS Summit London Attendee Exclusive: Builder Question of the Day
latest.description: If you're attending the AWS Summit in London, come say hi at the Developer Community Zone in the Expo and get involved in our Builder Question of the Day challenge!

latest.title: Minha primeira semana como Líder Estudantil AWS Builder na UNIESP: O que aprendi no AWS Builder Center
latest.description: Acompanhe minha jornada como Líder Estudantil unindo o desenvolvimento Frontend com as ferramentas práticas do AWS Builder Center para criar impacto tecnológico real. Saiba como essa comunidade global ajuda estudantes a superarem desafios técnicos e construírem conexões duradouras no mercado.

latest.title: O que é ser um Líder Estudantil Builder AWS na prática.
latest.description:
Ser Builder Leader é levar o conhecimento de cloud computing para dentro da universidade ,organizando comunidades, eventos e conexões que transformam a trajetória de outros estudantes.

Uma experiência que une liderança, tecnologia e comunidade, tudo dentro da própria universidade.

latest.title: Lugares do seu dia a dia que usam cloud
latest.description: Você provavelmente usou cloud computing hoje. Não uma vez — várias.

latest.title: Minha primeira semana com o AWS Builder Center: o que eu aprendi (e o que ninguém me contou antes)
latest.description: Tudo que eu pude perceber no primeiro contato com AWS.

latest.title: Automate Code Modernization with AWS Transform and Kiro
latest.description: Run enterprise-scale code transformations, version upgrades, and SDK migrations directly from Kiro — with job state synced across IDE and web console.

latest.title: Technical Deep Dive: How I Delivered Zero Trust Security for a Client’s Legacy PHP System — Without Rewrites, Downtime, or Big Costs (Part 2)
latest.description: This section expands on the technical architecture and implementation behind my recent Zero Trust case study.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Perspective
trending.description: Perspective is an AI-powered mental health companion that extracts clinical insight from free-form speech — no mood scales required. Using 4-cluster parallel extraction on Amazon Bedrock, validated against the Subjective Units of Distress Scale (SUDS), Work and Social Adjustment Scale (WSAS), PHQ-9, and GAD-7, it serves undiagnosed users and diagnosed patients alike. Clinician-validated by three practising doctors. Built on AWS serverless with Kiro.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: NeuroVoice
trending.description: Small moments, repeated daily, reveal what single snapshots never can - patterns that quietly signal neurological risk. NeuroVoice is a multimodal Parkinson’s screening platform that tracks pattern over time to detect subtle neurological changes early.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: CareLens AI — Transparent Care Guidance When It Matters Most.
trending.description: CareLens is a privacy-first AI platform that helps people understand healthcare costs before seeking treatment. By analyzing de-identified symptoms, location, and optional insurance details, it compares care options like ER, urgent care, or specialists and surfaces real-world price ranges using hospital transparency and CMS data. It doesn’t diagnose—it delivers clear, grounded cost, bill analyzing and care guidance so users can make confident decisions without surprise bills.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Veloquity - The Agentic Evidence Intelligent Platform Turning Raw Feedback into Evidence-Driven Decisions
trending.description: Decisions don’t fail from too little data - they fail from too much noise. Veloquity, an agentic evidence intelligence platform, filters that noise by transforming fragmented feedback into validated evidence and delivering explainable, prioritized recommendations with full source-to-decision traceability that guides human decisions. READ ON TO SEE HOW.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: RetainIQ
trending.description: Detect knowledge concentration risk before it costs you. RetainIQ scores every critical topic 0–100 and triggers AI interventions. Zero docs effort required.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: ASET – Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth
trending.description: ASET (Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth) is an AI-powered claim verification platform built on AWS that verifies scientific claims against 1.2M+ peer-reviewed papers across 8 domains — and automatically fetches and permanently stores new papers from arXiv, PubMed, etc. when gaps are found, making the knowledge base self-growing with every query. From typed claims to YouTube videos and uploaded documents, ASET delivers evidence-backed trust scores in under 10 seconds.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Aether Health
trending.description: Discover how our AI-powered platform reimagines the last mile of healthcare by focusing on empathetic symptom checking and prescription decoding. We provide verified, calming tools to combat health anxiety and prevent dangerous medication errors for vulnerable populations.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Global Impact AI Navigator
trending.description: Global Impact AI Navigator (GIAN) is a multi-agent AI platform built on Amazon Bedrock that transforms a raw idea into a complete strategic package in under 60 seconds — SWOT diagnostic, live-grounded funding discovery, personalized roadmap, and a context-aware advisor. Designed for innovators in emerging markets, it democratizes access to the strategic guidance that usually requires expensive consultants or elite networks.
